nasb.text: Then behold, seven other cows came up after them from the Nile, ugly and gaunt, and they stood by the other cows on the bank of the Nile.

esv.text: And behold, seven other cows, ugly and thin, came up out of the Nile after them, and stood by the other cows on the bank of the Nile.

cnv.text: 接著，又有另外七頭母牛從河裡上來，又醜陋又瘦弱，站在岸上其他母牛旁邊。

ccb.text: 随后又有七头丑陋、瘦弱的母牛从河里上来，与那七头母牛一同站在河边。

csbs.text: 看哪！随后又有七头丑陋瘦弱的母牛从尼罗河里上来，站在河岸上那些母牛旁边。
